expectations.evidence: Only 7 issues found and listed. No full 33-item checklist evaluation performed.

expectations.text: Detected div onClick without keyboard accessibility
expectations.evidence: Issue #1: div with onClick has no onKeyDown/onKeyUp handler, no tabIndex

expectations.text: Detected duplicate id='card-item' when rendered in a list
expectations.evidence: Issue #5: Hard-coded id='card-item' causes duplicate IDs when multiple cards render

expectations.text: Each issue is mapped to a specific KWCAG item number
expectations.evidence: Uses non-standard references like '5.1.1 키보드 접근성', '5.3.1 적절한 역할 부여' instead of standard KWCAG item numbers 1-33

expectations.text: Fix recommendations are provided for each found issue
expectations.evidence: Each issue includes improvement recommendation with code examples
